TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kangbuli, kangboli Śļ∑Śĺ©Śäõ == masadumaay a ngangan Symphytum officinale L. (mitesekay a ngangan)Symphytum officinale L. ÁīęŤćČÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Boraginaceae Śļ∑Śĺ©ŚäõŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)kangbuli mikeliday a ngangan (tada ngangan)kangbuli, kangkuli, kangbuli, kangbuli Comfrey (igu a ngangan)Comfrey ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Pinsuma Tamasaz Tu Ismud,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kangboli,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Tamaumaku,ťĄí Cuun Ravuku,ťõÖÁĺé Mangapya (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Pinsuma Tamasaz Tu Ismud,Sakidaya Kangboli,Lukay Tamaumaku,Co Cuun Ravuku,Tau Mangapya (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Tau, Co, Lukay kaliwasak nu langaw Kanbuli si ngangan aca tu kankuli, nui Ouzhou a langawan, patayni han i Taywan, liwasak satu i tepadtepadan nu bayu. hina adih kita i palumaay tu baluan atu sasapayuan a langawan. sasapayuan i kasanekan han, kala akeakenekan sapi', idaw ku ledek, micunus tu idang, pasaluimeng tu banic atu ngan, tatenga sakay gao-xieya, tahkal nu idan, mi'pud tu banic a imelangan. . anu hinakan kitatu kangbuli miadada tu atay, paculil tu idang, silusidaw, mingaay tu hiwhiw, alutid, bala nu adadaan. milihida tu langaw musakamu kanghuli u Zi-cao-ke kanghuli mikeliday nu yadahay a mihcaan nanay a lutukan a langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu lima a bataan ~ cacay a lasubu a congfen, langaw han yadah ku sanglacay nu calekahay a banuhan, angangan kala diceman mahida u sakupat ku papaha. cacay ku batac masasuala ku papah i akaway, papah han mahida u ti'kuk sadicem sa, tanayu han makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima~ sepat a bataan idaw ku limaa congfen, ahebal han makaala tu walu ~sabaw tu cacay a congfen, pabaw nu papahan mahida u sakubat ku wayway. sibalu sa mahida u sibuhangay nu cacuhcuhan, idaw ku sanglacay, kalawlawan, kiyukiyuan ku kulit, mahida u tuki ku adiping nu ayawan han lima kuma celitay, idaw ku lima nika celitan nu kakicuh atu lima ku tamaan, badi' sa kubalu malaheci heci nida mala sepat kunika benis. Zi-cao-ke Kangbuli mikeliday nu yadahay nu mihcaan a lutukan, singaganaca tu kangbuli, kangfu-li, kangfu-li, kang-fu-li, kang-gu-li,zi-caoye, zi-cao-gen, kangfu-cao, juhe-cao, you-yi-cao, aiguo-cao, qi-boli-cao, boli-cao, hei-cao. nui dong-ou, gaojiasuo-qu, mapulungay a langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu enem a bataan ~ siwa a bataan a congfen, bangsis, langw nu belih malulud siatekakay nu banuhan atu sanglacay nu apuyuay a banuhan. ŚÖ∑ť¶ôśį£,ś†ĻÁôľťĀĒ, . bangsis, kapah ku lamit, tada angangan tabaki tanektek, kala kiyukiyuan nu hese ku kulit, pinay kiya ku tatapangan, patelek atu makilit kuni tapabaw, yadah ku ciit, angangan mahidau u dicem nu ukak , i tapang tu asipapah atu angangan asipapah, tapang sipapahsa masakaputu, makaala tu lima a bataan ~ pitu a bataan kuni kasi papahan, yadahan makaala tu tusa a lasubu a papahan. angangan tu asipapah, cacay ku batac masasuala ku papah i akaway, kala diceman ku papah, mamucuy ku dicem nu papah, mahida u ti'kuk ku wayway, sadicem sa i ciit, teban nu sasa a papahan nu tapang masa dicemtu, pabaw nu papah a tapangan caay kaw madicemay, caay kaw madicemay atu satanayu'sa ku sasa', malecad ku kaku nu papah, tanayu nu papah han makaala tu tulu a bataan ~ enem a bataan a congfen, ahebal han makaala tu pulu' ~ tasa a bataan a congfen. . teban nu papahan atu pabaw nu papahan adidi, kibetul, hekal nu papah kala langlangdawan, abuan ku langdaw nu kulit, masabanu ku tebanay nu papahan a sasulitan, nai ku adidiay a papahan, tanayu ku papah nu akaway, pabaw han mahida u sakubat, apuyu makulebut mahida u nikacebal nu balu, teban nu papah atu pabaway nu papah nai ku akaway. masasu acawaay nu baluan, mamulmul numacebalay nu baluan, balu nu akawa cacay , tusa, yadah ku balu, kakicuh nu balu masalaluma', lima kuni ka celit nu kakicuh, nika cilitan micapitu tatapangan, nika celitan masadicem ku wayway, samadicem sa kunuayawan, adiping han mahida u tuku ku wayway, mahida u tuki ku wayway, mamulmul mahida u cacuhcuhan ku wayway. tanayu han makaala tu sabaw tu sepat, sabaw tu lima a congli, sangalacay ku balu, kalawlawan sanglacay, kalawlawan, kiyukiyuan sumanah, kala kiyukiyuan, kiyuwan ku kulit, ihekal kuni ka celitan nu limaay, masa sankaku kunika celit, pasayda i hekal kunika kulebut, masa aipingay nu takulawan umadicemay nu mikabitay, lima ku sasemaan, tanayu' han makaala tu sepat a congli. Inai' kuni ka tahekal nu adiping, mahida usisalay nu baluan, lima ku tama nu sasemaan, mikabit i adiping nu salumaan a akawayan, mikabitay nu ngisngis tanayu' han tulu a congli, sasa atu salumaan nu heci malecad ku ahebal. salumaan nu balu han tanayu makaala tu tulu, sepat a congli, tunduh idaw ku masa pucuay nu salumaan, tusa ku pudac nu tamaan a heci, mapulungay kunuheni, satabaki sa ku tangah, miki tanayu' tu adiping, salumaan kanca naiku pa'nu. alahican nu dumaan a maduhemay nu cacaya nu atekakay a hecian, salumaan nu heci han i pabaw, u heci nida mala sepat kunika cilitan nu salumaan, teban nu akaway a mueneng, adidi nu hecian, malasepat ku heci, nika babenisan nu heci makilit kuni kasa ti'kuk nu wayway a heci, tanayu' han tulu, sepat a congli, lumeni', cupenat, malikat. kasi baluan han lima~ pulu' a buladan. kangbuli itini i Taywan caay ka hina siheci, tada u akaway ku pahecekan amibuwah, taneng ku lamit sabuwahan. paheceken amibuwah saiten kuma matungusay a ciitan tu tusa ~ tulu a batacan nu ciitan, pahceken itida inibanangan tamelacay nu lalaan, acaay ka acek ku hatanengen ku lalemet, halhalen kuni kasilamitan limaden patayda i kabing,kya malabaluhay nu langawan. . itini i sadingsing, pasabaan nu tusaay a puu'an sakapahay a apaluma atu pahecek tu langawan, itini i Taywan, sakapahay nu palumaan tu Kangbuli han i lima a lasubuan ~cacay a malebutan ku talakaw nu buyuan. u siwkay nu nipaluma ŚéüÁĒĘś≠źśī≤,ŚĺĆŚľēťÄ≤ŚŹįÁĀ£. u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == kaŇčbur~…ĺi, kaŇčbor~…ĺi *** == masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan sjmpńßjtum offi ¶inar~…ĺ…ô r~…ĺ. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)sjmpńßjtum offi ¶inar~…ĺ…ô r~…ĺ. *** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)boragina ¶…ôa…ô **** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ŇčaŇčan)kaŇčbur~…ĺi mik…ôr~…ĺidaj a ŇčaŇčan (tada ŇčaŇčan)kaŇčbur~…ĺi, kaŇčkur~…ĺi, kaŇčbur~…ĺi, kaŇčbur~…ĺi ¶omfr…ô (igu a ŇčaŇčan) ¶omfr…ô ** pinsuma tamasaz tu ismud,**** kaŇčbor~…ĺi,** tamaumaku,* ¶uun *a*uku,** maŇčapja (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun pinsuma tamasaz tu ismud,sakidaja kaŇčbor~…ĺi,r~…ĺukaj tamaumaku, ¶o ¶uun *a*uku,tau maŇčapja (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, tau, ¶o, r~…ĺukaj kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw kanbur~…ĺi si ŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu kankur~…ĺi, nui ouzńßou a r~…ĺaŇčawan, patajni ńßan i tajwan, r~…ĺiwasak satu i t…ôpadt…ôpadan nu baju. ńßina adińß kita i par~…ĺumaaj tu bar~…ĺuan atu sasapajuan a r~…ĺaŇčawan. sasapajuan i kasan…ôkan ńßan, kar~…ĺa ak…ôak…ôn…ôkan sapi Ē~ °, idaw ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, mi ¶unus tu idaŇč, pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu bani ¶ atu Ňčan, tat…ôŇča sakaj gao-*i…ôa, tańßkar~…ĺ nu idan, mi Ē~ °pud tu bani ¶ a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. . anu ńßinakan kitatu kaŇčbur~…ĺi miadada tu ataj, pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu idaŇč, sir~…ĺusidaw, miŇčaaj tu ńßiwńßiw, ar~…ĺutid, bar~…ĺa nu adadaan. mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu kaŇčńßur~…ĺi u zi- ¶ao-k…ô kaŇčńßur~…ĺi mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu jadańßaj a mińß ¶aan nanaj a r~…ĺutukan a r~…ĺaŇčawan, tar~…ĺakaw nu r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a bataan ~ ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a ¶oŇčf…ôn, r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan jadańß ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkańßaj a banuńßan, aŇčaŇčan kar~…ĺa di ¶…ôman mańßida u sakupat ku papańßa. ¶a ¶aj ku bata ¶ masasuar~…ĺa ku papańß i akawaj, papańß ńßan mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk sadi ¶…ôm sa, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima~ s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺimaa ¶oŇčf…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu ~sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a ¶oŇčf…ôn, pabaw nu papańßan mańßida u sakubat ku wajwaj. sibar~…ĺu sa mańßida u sibuńßaŇčaj nu ¶a ¶uńß ¶uńßan, idaw ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, kijukijuan ku kur~…ĺit, mańßida u tuki ku adipiŇč nu ajawan ńßan r~…ĺima kuma ¶…ôr~…ĺitaj, idaw ku r~…ĺima nika ¶…ôr~…ĺitan nu kaki ¶uńß atu r~…ĺima ku tamaan, badi Ē~ ° sa kubar~…ĺu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ńß…ô ¶i nida mar~…ĺa s…ôpat kunika b…ônis. zi- ¶ao-k…ô kaŇčbur~…ĺi mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu jadańßaj nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺutukan, siŇčagana ¶a tu kaŇčbur~…ĺi, kaŇčfu-r~…ĺi, kaŇčfu-r~…ĺi, kaŇč-fu-r~…ĺi, kaŇč-gu-r~…ĺi,zi- ¶aoj…ô, zi- ¶ao-g…ôn, kaŇčfu- ¶ao, juńß…ô- ¶ao, jou-ji- ¶ao, aiguo- ¶ao, *i-bor~…ĺi- ¶ao, bor~…ĺi- ¶ao, ńß…ôi- ¶ao. nui doŇč-ou, gaojiasuo-*u, mapur~…ĺuŇčaj a r~…ĺaŇčawan, tar~…ĺakaw nu r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ôm a bataan tan…ôkt…ôk, kar~…ĺa kijukijuan nu ńß…ôs…ô ku kur~…ĺit, pinaj kija ku tatapaŇčan, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk atu makir~…ĺit kuni tapabaw, jadańß ku ¶iit, aŇčaŇčan mańßidau u di ¶…ôm nu ukak , i tapaŇč tu asipapańß atu aŇčaŇčan asipapańß, tapaŇč sipapańßsa masakaputu, makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a bataan ~ pitu a bataan kuni kasi papańßan, jadańßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu a papańßan. aŇčaŇčan tu asipapańß, ¶a ¶aj ku bata ¶ masasuar~…ĺa ku papańß i akawaj, kar~…ĺa di ¶…ôman ku papańß, mamu ¶uj ku di ¶…ôm nu papańß, mańßida u ti Ē~ °kuk ku wajwaj, sadi ¶…ôm sa i ¶iit, t…ôban nu sasa a papańßan nu tapaŇč masa di ¶…ômtu, pabaw nu papańß a tapaŇčan ¶aaj kaw madi ¶…ômaj, ¶aaj kaw madi ¶…ômaj atu satanaju Ē~ °sa ku sasa Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kaku nu papańß, tanaju nu papańß ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a bataan r~…ĺaŇčr~…ĺaŇčdawan, abuan ku r~…ĺaŇčdaw nu kur~…ĺit, masabanu ku t…ôbanaj nu papańßan a sasur~…ĺitan, nai ku adidiaj a papańßan, tanaju ku papańß nu akawaj, pabaw ńßan mańßida u sakubat, apuju makur~…ĺ…ôbut mańßida u nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺu, t…ôban nu papańß atu pabawaj nu papańß nai ku akawaj. masasu a ¶awaaj nu bar~…ĺuan, mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ numa ¶…ôbar~…ĺaj nu bar~…ĺuan, bar~…ĺu nu akawa ¶a ¶aj , tusa, jadańß ku bar~…ĺu, kaki ¶uńß nu bar~…ĺu masar~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, r~…ĺima kuni ka ¶…ôr~…ĺit nu kaki ¶uńß, nika ¶ir~…ĺitan mi ¶apitu tatapaŇčan, nika ¶…ôr~…ĺitan masadi ¶…ôm ku wajwaj, samadi ¶…ôm sa kunuajawan, adipiŇč ńßan mańßida u tuku ku wajwaj, mańßida u tuki ku wajwaj, mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ mańßida u ¶a ¶uńß ¶uńßan ku wajwaj. tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu sabaw tu s…ôpat, sabaw tu r~…ĺima a ¶oŇčr~…ĺi, saŇčar~…ĺa ¶aj ku bar~…ĺu, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, kijukijuan sumanańß, kar~…ĺa kijukijuan, kijuwan ku kur~…ĺit, ińß…ôkar~…ĺ kuni ka ¶…ôr~…ĺitan nu r~…ĺimaaj, masa sankaku kunika ¶…ôr~…ĺit, pasajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ kunika kur~…ĺ…ôbut, masa aipiŇčaj nu takur~…ĺawan umadi ¶…ômaj nu mikabitaj, r~…ĺima ku sas…ômaan, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat a ¶oŇčr~…ĺi. inai Ē~ ° kuni ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu adipiŇč, mańßida usisar~…ĺaj nu bar~…ĺuan, r~…ĺima ku tama nu sas…ômaan, mikabit i adipiŇč nu sar~…ĺumaan a akawajan, mikabitaj nu ŇčisŇčis tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan tur~…ĺu a ¶oŇčr~…ĺi, sasa atu sar~…ĺumaan nu ńß…ô ¶i mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ. sar~…ĺumaan nu bar~…ĺu ńßan tanaju makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu, s…ôpat a ¶oŇčr~…ĺi, tunduńß idaw ku masa pu ¶uaj nu sar~…ĺumaan, tusa ku puda ¶ nu tamaan a ńß…ô ¶i, mapur~…ĺuŇčaj kunuńß…ôni, satabaki sa ku taŇčańß, miki tanaju Ē~ ° tu adipiŇč, sar~…ĺumaan kan ¶a naiku pa Ē~ °nu. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an nu dumaan a maduńß…ômaj nu ¶a ¶aja nu at…ôkakaj a ńß…ô ¶ian, sar~…ĺumaan nu ńß…ô ¶i ńßan i pabaw, u ńß…ô ¶i nida mar~…ĺa s…ôpat kunika ¶ir~…ĺitan nu sar~…ĺumaan, t…ôban nu akawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇč, adidi nu ńß…ô ¶ian, mar~…ĺas…ôpat ku ńß…ô ¶i, nika bab…ônisan nu ńß…ô ¶i makir~…ĺit kuni kasa ti Ē~ °kuk nu wajwaj a ńß…ô ¶i, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan tur~…ĺu, s…ôpat a ¶oŇčr~…ĺi, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, ¶up…ônat, mar~…ĺikat. kasi bar~…ĺuan ńßan r~…ĺima~ pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° a bur~…ĺadan. kaŇčbur~…ĺi itini i tajwan ¶aaj ka ńßina sińß…ô ¶i, tada u akawaj ku pańß…ô ¶…ôkan amibuwańß, tan…ôŇč ku r~…ĺamit sabuwańßan. pańß…ô ¶…ôk…ôn amibuwańß sait…ôn kuma matuŇčusaj a ¶iitan tu tusa ~ tur~…ĺu a bata ¶an nu ¶iitan, pańß ¶…ôk…ôn itida inibanaŇčan tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, a ¶aaj ka a ¶…ôk ku ńßatan…ôŇč…ôn ku r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôm…ôt, ńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ…ôn kuni kasir~…ĺamitan r~…ĺimad…ôn patajda i kabiŇč,kja mar~…ĺabar~…ĺuńßaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan. . itini i sadiŇčsiŇč, pasabaan nu tusaaj a puu Ē~ °an sakapańßaj a apar~…ĺuma atu pańß…ô ¶…ôk tu r~…ĺaŇčawan, itini i tajwan, sakapańßaj nu par~…ĺumaan tu kaŇčbur~…ĺi ńßan i r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubuan ~ ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan ku tar~…ĺakaw nu bujuan. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma ****,*****. u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == kangbuli, kangboli Śļ∑Śĺ©Śäõ == masadumaay a ngangan Symphytum officinale L. (mitesekay a ngangan)Symphytum officinale L. ÁīęŤćČÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Boraginaceae Śļ∑Śĺ©ŚäõŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)kangbuli mikeliday a ngangan (tada ngangan)kangbuli, kangkuli, kangbuli, kangbuli Comfrey (igu a ngangan)Comfrey ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Pinsuma Tamasaz Tu Ismud,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Kangboli,ť≠ĮŚáĪ Tamaumaku,ťĄí Cuun Ravuku,ťõÖÁĺé Mangapya (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Pinsuma Tamasaz Tu Ismud,Sakidaya Kangboli,Lukay Tamaumaku,Co Cuun Ravuku,Tau Mangapya (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Tau, Co, Lukay kaliwasak nu langaw Kanbuli si ngangan aca tu kankuli, nui Ouzhou a langawan, patayni han i Taywan, liwasak satu i tepadtepadan nu bayu. hina adih kita i palumaay tu baluan atu sasapayuan a langawan. sasapayuan i kasanekan han, kala akeakenekan sapi', idaw ku ledek, micunus tu idang, pasaluimeng tu banic atu ngan, tatenga sakay gao-xieya, tahkal nu idan, mi'pud tu banic a imelangan. . anu hinakan kitatu kangbuli miadada tu atay, paculil tu idang, silusidaw, mingaay tu hiwhiw, alutid, bala nu adadaan. milihida tu langaw musakamu kanghuli u Zi-cao-ke kanghuli mikeliday nu yadahay a mihcaan nanay a lutukan a langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu lima a bataan ~ cacay a lasubu a congfen, langaw han yadah ku sanglacay nu calekahay a banuhan, angangan kala diceman mahida u sakupat ku papaha. cacay ku batac masasuala ku papah i akaway, papah han mahida u ti'kuk sadicem sa, tanayu han makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima~ sepat a bataan idaw ku limaa congfen, ahebal han makaala tu walu ~sabaw tu cacay a congfen, pabaw nu papahan mahida u sakubat ku wayway. sibalu sa mahida u sibuhangay nu cacuhcuhan, idaw ku sanglacay, kalawlawan, kiyukiyuan ku kulit, mahida u tuki ku adiping nu ayawan han lima kuma celitay, idaw ku lima nika celitan nu kakicuh atu lima ku tamaan, badi' sa kubalu malaheci heci nida mala sepat kunika benis. Zi-cao-ke Kangbuli mikeliday nu yadahay nu mihcaan a lutukan, singaganaca tu kangbuli, kangfu-li, kangfu-li, kang-fu-li, kang-gu-li,zi-caoye, zi-cao-gen, kangfu-cao, juhe-cao, you-yi-cao, aiguo-cao, qi-boli-cao, boli-cao, hei-cao. nui dong-ou, gaojiasuo-qu, mapulungay a langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu enem a bataan ~ siwa a bataan a congfen, bangsis, langw nu belih malulud siatekakay nu banuhan atu sanglacay nu apuyuay a banuhan. ŚÖ∑ť¶ôśį£,ś†ĻÁôľťĀĒ, . bangsis, kapah ku lamit, tada angangan tabaki tanektek, kala kiyukiyuan nu hese ku kulit, pinay kiya ku tatapangan, patelek atu makilit kuni tapabaw, yadah ku ciit, angangan mahidau u dicem nu ukak , i tapang tu asipapah atu angangan asipapah, tapang sipapahsa masakaputu, makaala tu lima a bataan ~ pitu a bataan kuni kasi papahan, yadahan makaala tu tusa a lasubu a papahan. angangan tu asipapah, cacay ku batac masasuala ku papah i akaway, kala diceman ku papah, mamucuy ku dicem nu papah, mahida u ti'kuk ku wayway, sadicem sa i ciit, teban nu sasa a papahan nu tapang masa dicemtu, pabaw nu papah a tapangan caay kaw madicemay, caay kaw madicemay atu satanayu'sa ku sasa', malecad ku kaku nu papah, tanayu nu papah han makaala tu tulu a bataan ~ enem a bataan a congfen, ahebal han makaala tu pulu' ~ tasa a bataan a congfen. . teban nu papahan atu pabaw nu papahan adidi, kibetul, hekal nu papah kala langlangdawan, abuan ku langdaw nu kulit, masabanu ku tebanay nu papahan a sasulitan, nai ku adidiay a papahan, tanayu ku papah nu akaway, pabaw han mahida u sakubat, apuyu makulebut mahida u nikacebal nu balu, teban nu papah atu pabaway nu papah nai ku akaway. masasu acawaay nu baluan, mamulmul numacebalay nu baluan, balu nu akawa cacay , tusa, yadah ku balu, kakicuh nu balu masalaluma', lima kuni ka celit nu kakicuh, nika cilitan micapitu tatapangan, nika celitan masadicem ku wayway, samadicem sa kunuayawan, adiping han mahida u tuku ku wayway, mahida u tuki ku wayway, mamulmul mahida u cacuhcuhan ku wayway. tanayu han makaala tu sabaw tu sepat, sabaw tu lima a congli, sangalacay ku balu, kalawlawan sanglacay, kalawlawan, kiyukiyuan sumanah, kala kiyukiyuan, kiyuwan ku kulit, ihekal kuni ka celitan nu limaay, masa sankaku kunika celit, pasayda i hekal kunika kulebut, masa aipingay nu takulawan umadicemay nu mikabitay, lima ku sasemaan, tanayu' han makaala tu sepat a congli. Inai' kuni ka tahekal nu adiping, mahida usisalay nu baluan, lima ku tama nu sasemaan, mikabit i adiping nu salumaan a akawayan, mikabitay nu ngisngis tanayu' han tulu a congli, sasa atu salumaan nu heci malecad ku ahebal. salumaan nu balu han tanayu makaala tu tulu, sepat a congli, tunduh idaw ku masa pucuay nu salumaan, tusa ku pudac nu tamaan a heci, mapulungay kunuheni, satabaki sa ku tangah, miki tanayu' tu adiping, salumaan kanca naiku pa'nu. alahican nu dumaan a maduhemay nu cacaya nu atekakay a hecian, salumaan nu heci han i pabaw, u heci nida mala sepat kunika cilitan nu salumaan, teban nu akaway a mueneng, adidi nu hecian, malasepat ku heci, nika babenisan nu heci makilit kuni kasa ti'kuk nu wayway a heci, tanayu' han tulu, sepat a congli, lumeni', cupenat, malikat. kasi baluan han lima~ pulu' a buladan. kangbuli itini i Taywan caay ka hina siheci, tada u akaway ku pahecekan amibuwah, taneng ku lamit sabuwahan. paheceken amibuwah saiten kuma matungusay a ciitan tu tusa ~ tulu a batacan nu ciitan, pahceken itida inibanangan tamelacay nu lalaan, acaay ka acek ku hatanengen ku lalemet, halhalen kuni kasilamitan limaden patayda i kabing,kya malabaluhay nu langawan. . itini i sadingsing, pasabaan nu tusaay a puu'an sakapahay a apaluma atu pahecek tu langawan, itini i Taywan, sakapahay nu palumaan tu Kangbuli han i lima a lasubuan ~cacay a malebutan ku talakaw nu buyuan. u siwkay nu nipaluma ŚéüÁĒĘś≠źśī≤,ŚĺĆŚľēťÄ≤ŚŹįÁĀ£. u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == kaŇčbur~…ĺi, kaŇčbor~…ĺi *** == masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan sjmpńßjtum offi ¶inar~…ĺ…ô r~…ĺ. ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
